DP.419.0004:
Berry Master’s House
Free Berries Available
DP.419.0005:
Trainer Tips\f
After a Berry is planted, watch the
color of the soil.\f
If the soil is dark, it means it has
plenty of moisture.\f
If the soil is lighter in color,
water it with your Sprayduck.
